text: I feel like something might be wrong — I can't put my finger on it.
label: non-infectious

text: I know it's likely nothing but I haven't felt right and it's worrying me.
label: non-infectious

text: My chest really hurts when I cough or take a deep breath. Quite a bit of phlegm, fever, feeling weak. 4 day(s), and it's escalating — I'm genuinely scared. Breathing is very laboured.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: My breathing is really laboured. Chest pain, high fever, can't stop coughing up phlegm. 9 day(s), deteriorating, and I'm really worried because it's getting worse. I'm burning up.

text: I can't breathe properly. Severe chest pain, coughing up greenish phlegm, high temperature. 6 day(s) and scared, and I'm really worried because it's getting worse.

text: I feel rotten. Sudden high fever, severe body aches, dry hacking cough. 1 day(s) now, and I can't seem to shake it, which frightens me.
